title: Minimum sum path in the matrix, (count paths and similar type do, also backtrack to find the Minimum path)

content.problemStatement:
Given a m x n grid filled with non-negative numbers, find a path from top left to bottom right, which minimizes the sum of all numbers along its path.


Note: You can only move either down or right at any point in time.
content.inputFormat: A 2D grid of integers, where each cell represents a non-negative number.
content.outputFormat: The minimum sum of all numbers along the path from the top left to the bottom right of the grid.

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to store the minimum sum of all numbers along the path to each cell, and then return the minimum sum of all numbers along the path to the bottom right cell.
